scope: Battle Command selected-brigade frontline diagnosis card

verified.notes: TypeScript and Vite production build passed after adding the selected-unit frontline diagnosis card.

The selected-brigade panel derives assigned frontline pressure from existing pressureReports, displays role, pressure, defender/reserve counts, distance, main threat, and readiness warnings, and calls inspectFrontlinePressure or applyFrontlinePressureResponse without adding BattleState or save fields.

notVerified.reason: In-app browser localhost URL policy blocks the current http://127.0.0.1:5173/ QA path in this thread.
Mobile/cellphone QA is currently outside the active Takawasi target.

expectedManualFlow: Open Battle Command and select a player brigade.
Verify the selected-brigade panel shows 担当戦線診断 below 指揮コンパス.
Verify the card shows assigned frontline name, pressure level, role, enemy pressure, defender count, reserve count, distance, main threat, and readiness warning or 余力維持.
Click 戦線表示 and verify the responsible frontline becomes selected and the viewport scrolls to the line or lead threat.
With a pressured frontline, click the response button and verify it calls the same frontline pressure response behavior.
Enable 予約指揮, click the response button, and verify the pressure response is queued rather than issued immediately.
Confirm console error count is 0 and the card does not overlap nearby command controls at desktop 1440px.
